rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption has no relationship to Educ. Code §22.0815, which governs applicability of employment provisions to districts of innovation and charter entities.
quote: A prohibition, restriction, or requirement imposed by this subchapter on an open-enrollment charter school applies to the same extent to a district of innovation or other charter entity.
_note: No conflict identified; rule_text concerns charter entity employment provisions, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
